member.office_address: 2328 Rayburn House Office Building Washington DC 20515-4603

form_analysis.form_instructions_text: Please complete this form if you are: 1) requesting that Rep. Bobby Scott cosign any appropriations letter; or 2) asking Rep. Bobby Scott submit a programmatic or report language request. Only one program or report language request is permitted per form submission. There are no limits on the total number of submissions. Please do not send any additional documents, faxes, emails, and/or cover letters. This completed form is the only requirement. Please use this link to the President's FY27 Budget Proposal (expected in March 2026) to assist with your submission: https://www.whitehouse.gov/omb/budget.

sections.description: Please provide the submitter's information for the requesting entity.

fields.label: What is the name of the entity/organization/locality submitting this request?
Who should the staff reach out to with any questions/ concerns regarding this request? Please list all persons.
fields.help_text: List the names of all relevant staff contacts.

fields.label: Please provide the organization's phone number for any follow-up questions and information.
Please provide the best email address for any follow-up questions and information.
Is this a programmatic, report language, or a bill language request?
fields.rationale: The pre-computed reference values explicitly identify this as a 'Programmatic' request type.

fields.label: Which appropriations subcommittee does the request fall under?
options: Labor, Health and Human Services, Education
National Security, Department of State (formerly State, Foreign Operations)
fields.rationale: NASA funding falls under the Commerce, Justice, Science, and Related Agencies subcommittee as specified in the reference data.

fields.label: What is the federal agency for your request? (i.e. Department of Justice) *Please ensure that this agency matches the correct subcommittee in the previous question.*
fields.rationale: As per the Reference Values, the agency for this request is NASA.

fields.label: What is the appropriations account for your request? (i.e. Office of Justice Programs - State and Local Justice Assistance)
fields.rationale: The account name is 'Science' (Science Mission Directorate) as specified in the reference values.

fields.label:
*For Programmatic Requests ONLY - Total Funding*

To request a specific level of funding, please select "Other" and provide the exact amount of funding requested. If you select other, please enter the total, numerical, amount of requested funding with no commas, words, or symbols (e.g. dollar signs).

For language requests, please select "I am submitting a language request"

To guide your response to the below question, you can determine your preference by reviewing the President's FY27 budget when it becomes available: https://www.whitehouse.gov/omb/budget/ or reviewing previous appropriation levels.
fields.help_text: Select the funding priority or provide a specific numerical amount for FY27 programmatic requests.
options: Support the President's FY27 budget request
I am submitting a language request.
fields.rationale: The request for $9,000,000,000 represents a significant increase over the FY2026 enacted level of $7,250,000,000 (a 24% increase), making 'Funding should be increased' the most accurate choice.

fields.label:
*Language Requests Only*

If you have an appropriations language request, please submit the text in the below field. Only one language request is accepted per submission. 
If you are submitting a programmatic request, please disregard this question and type 'n/a' into the text box below and submit your completed form.

For appropriations language requests only, please provide the requested language here. Brevity is strongly encouraged.
fields.rationale: This is a programmatic funding request, not a language request. The form instructions specifically request 'n/a' for programmatic submissions.

fields.label: If you would like Congressman Scott to sign onto a letter, please provide the name of the Member's Office leading the letter.
fields.draft_value: Reps. Don Bacon (R-NE) and Judy Chu (D-CA)
fields.rationale: The reference values indicate an existing House letter is being led by Representatives Bacon and Chu.

fields.label: If you would like Congressman Scott to sign onto a letter, please provide the email address of the staff contact in the office leading the letter (i.e. firstname.lastname@mail.house.gov)

If you are requesting Congressman Scott to send a letter individually to the Appropriations Committee (i.e. not sponsored or signed by another Member of Congress), please provide suggested text of this letter.
fields.draft_value:
* Request $9 billion for NASA Science to restore stability after FY26 disruptions and maintain U.S. competitive edge over Chinese space expansion.
* Protect $350M+ in VA-3 obligations (FY23-25) supporting 151 contracts and 55 grants across institutions in Hampton, Norfolk, and Newport News.
* Sustain critical research infrastructure and high-skill jobs at major local employers like Amentum Technology and academic leaders like Hampton University and CNU.
* Highlight NASA Science's 3-to-1 economic ROI and its essential role in bolstering the aerospace and STEM talent pipeline in the Hampton Roads region.
fields.rationale: This draft incorporates the $9B topline ask, the total district spending figure ($350M+), and names top local recipients (Amentum, Hampton University, CNU) found in the spending data. It utilizes the advocacy guide's emphasis on competition with China and economic impact.

top_contracts.description: Igf::ct::igf this "task order" has been created in the Contract Management Module (CMM) system for funding purposes only and is not an actual task order with a statement of work and other task order requirements.  This "task order" has been created for funding obligations only and to account for cmm and sap financial system functionality.  This "task order" is to fund nnl13aa14c clin 1 (Maintenance).  Center Maintenance, Operations, and Engineering (CMOE) Contract. Requirement for the Maintenance, Operations, and Engineering of LARC'S institutional facilities and highly technical research facilities for mission success.  The cmoe Contract will provide core support services to LARC in the areas of institutional and research Operations, Maintenance, and Engineering (OME).  These technical services include:  research facilities Operations (E.g., highly specialized wind tunnels, laboratories, test stands, instrumentation calibration/repair) central utilities Operations (E.g., steam, compressed air, electrical power distribution, potable water) technology development/administration (E.g., facility automation systems [fas], data acquisition systems [das]) research and institutional facility Maintenance (E.g., preventive Maintenance, trouble calls, reliability centered Maintenance [rcm], facility condition assessment [fca]) and facility Engineering (E.g., design, construction, configuration Management, tactical Engineering, pressure system recertification, project Management/planning support).
top_contracts.generated_award_summary: Maintaining and engineering critical NASA research facilities and utilities.

top_grants.description: We propose a series of balloon campaigns  which will take place every summer in 2021  2022 and 2023 in india and saudi arabia to study the nature  origin and formation of the atal.
top_grants.generated_award_summary: Investigating the origin and formation of the atal using atmospheric balloons.
